must_detect.matched_text:
STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — UPSI; Embargo until 17:00 IST, 14 July 2026; Deal Codename: Project Neem.
To: Board of Shikra Renewables Limited (listed on Indus Stock Exchange); From: Ms. Kavya Raneshkar, General Counsel; cc: Mr. Devansh Morpith (CFO), Dr. Rishanv Goelkar (Independent Director).
Re: Proposed 51% acquisition of Vrindha GridTech Private Limited for approximately ₹640 crore, funded via a mix of primary infusion and acquisition debt.
Definitive documents to include a Share Purchase Agreement and a Shareholders’ Agreement, with signing targeted for 28 June 2026 and a long-stop date of 30 September 2026.
Conditions precedent include no Material Adverse Effect on Vrindha; provided that general changes in renewable tariff benchmarks, industry-wide wage inflation, or interest rate movements shall not be deemed a MAC.
Under SEBI (PIT) Regulations, treat all information herein as unpublished price sensitive information; the trading window remains closed for insiders and designated persons until the embargo lifts.
Investor-relations draft (not for external distribution) forecasts EPS accretion of 8–10% in FY27 and revenue synergies of ~₹110 crore over the first 24 months.
Financing plan contemplates debt refinancing of ₹300 crore at a blended 9.1% and upfront working-capital infusion of ₹120 crore, subject to ISX lender consents and negative pledge waivers.
For DPDPA compliance, KYC workflows will process PAN, Aadhaar, and GSTIN data; obtain verifiable consent, mask identifiers (retain last 4 digits only), and flag accounts of customers who are children under 18 for guardian consent.
No Aadhaar or PAN numbers are to be transmitted over email; use the consent manager tokens, with access restricted to the Data Protection Officer and the onboarding squad pursuant to our data minimisation standard.
Public-source note: tariff assumptions rely on the State Energy Department’s FY2023 schedule posted online and are not UPSI by themselves.
Notwithstanding clauses 4–5, the parties agree that ordinary-course customer churn, workforce realignment, and seasonal monsoon disruptions shall not constitute an MAE for purposes of completion.
Not for circulation beyond the Board and external counsel; any leak before the embargo lifts will require immediate ISX disclosure and SEBI intimation within 24 hours of awareness.
todo: align ir draft with disclosure controls, circulate spa clean draft by tuesday eod, and yes the spa-day invite is moved to friday afternoon.
